pi_items.source: Task metadata and description are internally consistent. 'HMIS' (Health Management Information System) is verified as the official acronym used in Sierra Leone's health sector. DHIS2 is confirmed as the system used by Sierra Leone's Ministry of Health and Sanitation since 2008.

pi_items.metadata_value: Welcome to the Sierra Leone Health Information Management System. This platform is managed by the Ministry of Health and Sanitation for authorized health personnel only.
pi_items.verified_value: Welcome to the Sierra Leone Health Information Management System. This platform is managed by the Ministry of Health and Sanitation for authorized health personnel only.
pi_items.source: Verified organization name via Ministry of Health website (mohs.gov.sl) and WHO/Devex databases. 'Ministry of Health and Sanitation' is the official English name of Sierra Leone's health ministry. Content is internally consistent with task description.

pi_items.metadata_value: System maintenance is scheduled for the last Sunday of each month from 22:00 to 02:00 GMT.
pi_items.verified_value: System maintenance is scheduled for the last Sunday of each month from 22:00 to 02:00 GMT.
pi_items.source: GMT timezone verified as correct for Sierra Leone (UTC+0, no daylight saving time). Maintenance window specification matches task description. Times are reasonable for a health system in GMT.

DHIS2 documentation confirms keyAnalyticsMaxLimit (maximum number of analytics records) has a default of 50,000 and can be increased to higher values like 100,000. Value of 100,000 is reasonable and within typical configuration ranges for DHIS2 systems.

pi_items.metadata_value: © 2024 Ministry of Health and Sanitation, Sierra Leone
pi_items.verified_value: © 2024 Ministry of Health and Sanitation, Sierra Leone
pi_items.source: Official ministry name verified via mohs.gov.sl and multiple authoritative sources. Copyright year 2024 is plausible for task metadata created in 2024. Format and content are appropriate for system footer.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task for configuring DHIS2 system branding. All metadata claims are verified: Sierra Leone's official health ministry is the 'Ministry of Health and Sanitation' and HMIS (Health Management Information System) is the recognized acronym for their health system (using DHIS2 since 2008). The default analytics record limit in DHIS2 is 50,000 and can be increased to 100,000 as specified. Sierra Leone's timezone is GMT with no daylight saving time, making the specified maintenance window times valid. All configuration field names (applicationTitle, applicationIntro, applicationNotification, applicationFooter, keyAnalyticsMaxLimit) are standard DHIS2 system settings.
